# IMPLEMENTATION_SPEC-nexoescolar.md

**Project:** Nexo Escolar — Landing Page de Alta Conversión  
**Client repo:** `https://github.com/carlosperez1986/nexoescolar.git`  
**Stack:** .NET 9 / Razor Pages / Bootstrap 5 / AOS.js / Decap CMS  
**Generated by:** `spec-driven-architecture` skill · @Orchestrator · 2026-05-02  
**Roadmap ref:** `PROJECT_ROADMAP-nexoescolar.md`  
**Briefing ref:** `inbox/briefing-nexoescolar.md`

---

## Overview

Single-page landing with 8 anchor sections served by one Razor Page (`Pages/Index.cshtml`). All nav links are anchor links (`/#hero`, `/#funciones`, etc.). Content is sourced from JSON files managed via Decap CMS at `/admin/`. A contact form submits to the same page via `OnPostAsync`. All animations are handled by AOS.js (`data-aos="fade-up"`). Glassmorphism effects use a custom CSS utility class `glass-card` (permitted gap from Bootstrap 5).

---

## Route Matrix

| # | Section | Anchor ID | Razor Page | Purpose | Template Type | Data Dependencies | Content Source | Acceptance Criteria |
|---|---------|-----------|-----------|---------|--------------|-------------------|----------------|---------------------|
| 1 | Navbar (sticky glass) | `navbar` | `Pages/Shared/_Layout.cshtml` | Navigation + branding | Shared layout | `FooterContent.Tagline` (logo only) | Hardcoded in layout | Sticky on scroll; transparent → `#0F1B3C` bg; logo renders "Nexo" (teal 800w) + "Escolar" (white 400w) |
| 2 | Hero | `#hero` | `Pages/Index.cshtml` | First impression + CTA scroll | Full-viewport section | `HeroBanner` | `content/pages/hero.json` | Headline renders; coded dashboard card (glass) + CSS phone frame visible; CTA scrolls to `#demo`; mouse-parallax active (8px phone, 4px dashboard) |
| 3 | Problema | `#problema` | `Pages/Index.cshtml` | Pain-point awareness | Card grid (4 col) | `ProblemaSection` | `content/pages/problema.json` | Headline + 4 pain-point cards render; glassmorphism border visible; AOS fade-up on scroll |
| 4 | Funciones | `#funciones` | `Pages/Index.cshtml` | Feature catalog | Bento grid | `List<FeatureCard>` | `content/collections/funciones/` (5 JSON files) | 5 bento cards render (desktop: row1 7/5, row2 4/4/4; mobile: full-width stacked); hover: teal border + scale(1.02) |
| 5 | Beneficios | `#beneficios` | `Pages/Index.cshtml` | Role-based value prop | Interactive Hub | `BeneficiosHub` | `content/pages/beneficios.json` | Desktop: SVG hub with 3 pulsing nodes (Directivos, Docentes, Padres); hover panel appears with opacity/translate transition; Mobile: Bootstrap Tabs stacked full-width |
| 6 | App | `#app` | `Pages/Index.cshtml` | Mobile app showcase | Split layout | `AppShowcase` | `content/pages/app.json` | Headline renders; CSS-only Android phone frame with 2 notification cards; no external images |
| 7 | Trust | `#trust` | `Pages/Index.cshtml` | Social proof | 3-block horizontal | `TrustSection` | `content/pages/trust.json` | 3 blocks render with Bootstrap Icons (Shield, Check-circle, Lock) in teal; headline renders |
| 8 | Demo (form) | `#demo` | `Pages/Index.cshtml` | Lead capture | Glassmorphism card | `ContactFormModel` (POST) | Static Razor (no CMS) | Form renders 4 fields; submit POST to `OnPostAsync`; success/error state renders; amber "Quiero mi demo" button full-width |
| 9 | FAQ | `#faq` | `Pages/Index.cshtml` | Objection handling | Bootstrap Accordion | `List<FaqItem>` | `content/collections/faq/` (3 JSON files) | 3 accordion items render with correct Spanish copy; expand/collapse works without JS framework |
| 10 | Footer | `#footer` | `Pages/Index.cshtml` | Brand close | Footer bar | `FooterContent` | `content/pages/footer.json` | Logo + tagline "Conectando colegios, docentes y familias." renders; `border-t` teal visible |
| — | Admin panel | `/admin/` | `wwwroot/admin/index.html` | CMS entry | Decap CMS static | None (Git backend) | `wwwroot/admin/config.yml` | Decap CMS loads at `/admin/`; GitHub OAuth login works; all collections visible |
| — | Form POST | `/` (POST) | `Pages/Index.cshtml.cs` | Form submission | PageModel handler | `ContactFormModel` | Static | Valid POST → email/webhook dispatch → redirect with `?success=true`; invalid → validation errors rendered |

---

## Content Contracts

### `content/pages/hero.json` — singleton
```json
{
  "headline":    "Gestión escolar en tiempo real para colegios que quieren operar mejor.",
  "subheadline": "La plataforma que conecta a directivos, docentes y familias en un solo lugar.",
  "cta_label":   "Quiero mi demo",
  "cta_href":    "#demo",
  "dashboard_chips": [
    { "label": "Asistencia hoy", "value": "94%" },
    { "label": "Comunicados",    "value": "12"  },
    { "label": "Grupos",         "value": "8"   }
  ],
  "phone_notification": "Tu hijo Marco llegó tarde hoy — Colegio Nexo"
}
```
**Model:** `Models/HeroBanner.cs`  
**Service accessor:** `ContentService.GetPage<HeroBanner>("hero")`  
**Required fields:** `headline`, `subheadline`, `cta_label`, `cta_href`  
**Optional:** `dashboard_chips`, `phone_notification`

---

### `content/pages/problema.json` — singleton
```json
{
  "headline": "La gestión escolar no puede depender de procesos dispersos.",
  "cards": [
    { "icon": "exclamation-circle", "title": "Asistencia manual",   "body": "Registros en papel que se pierden y llegan tarde a dirección." },
    { "icon": "chat-dots",          "title": "Comunicación rota",   "body": "Circulares que no llegan y WhatsApps sin trazabilidad." },
    { "icon": "grid",               "title": "Grupos desconectados","body": "Docentes sin visibilidad del estado real de sus grupos." },
    { "icon": "clock",              "title": "Reportes lentos",     "body": "Informes semanales que consumen horas de trabajo administrativo." }
  ]
}
```
**Model:** `Models/ProblemaSection.cs` + `Models/PainPoint.cs`  
**Service accessor:** `ContentService.GetPage<ProblemaSection>("problema")`  
**Required fields:** `headline`, `cards` (min 2, max 6)

---

### `content/collections/funciones/` — folder collection (5 files)

File naming convention: `{order:00}-{slug}.json`

```
funciones/01-asistencia.json
funciones/02-comunicados.json
funciones/03-grupos.json
funciones/04-reportes.json
funciones/05-notificaciones.json
```

Each file schema:
```json
{
  "order":       1,
  "title":       "Asistencia en tiempo real",
  "icon":        "person-check",
  "description": "Registra y consulta la asistencia de cualquier grupo en segundos desde cualquier dispositivo.",
  "span":        "large"
}
```
`span` values: `"large"` (col-span-7), `"medium"` (col-span-5), `"small"` (col-span-4). First card always `"large"`, second `"medium"`, cards 3-5 `"small"`.  
**Model:** `Models/FeatureCard.cs`  
**Service accessor:** `ContentService.GetCollection<FeatureCard>("funciones")`  
**Required fields:** `order`, `title`, `icon`, `description`  
**Optional:** `span` (default `"small"`)

---

### `content/pages/beneficios.json` — singleton
```json
{
  "headline": "Una plataforma. Tres perspectivas.",
  "subheadline": "Cada rol accede exactamente a lo que necesita.",
  "roles": [
    {
      "id": "directivos",
      "label": "Directivos",
      "icon": "building",
      "benefits": [
        "Panel unificado de asistencia, comunicados y grupos.",
        "Alertas automáticas de ausentismo crítico.",
        "Reportes exportables para inspección escolar."
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "docentes",
      "label": "Docentes",
      "icon": "person-workspace",
      "benefits": [
        "Registro de asistencia en un toque desde el móvil.",
        "Comunicados segmentados por grupo.",
        "Historial completo por alumno."
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "padres",
      "label": "Padres",
      "icon": "people",
      "benefits": [
        "Notificaciones push de llegada, tardanza o ausencia.",
        "Acceso a calificaciones y comunicados en tiempo real.",
        "Canal directo con el tutor del grupo."
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```
**Model:** `Models/BeneficiosHub.cs` + `Models/RoleHub.cs`  
**Service accessor:** `ContentService.GetPage<BeneficiosHub>("beneficios")`  
**Required fields:** `headline`, `roles` (exactly 3)

```json
{
  "headline":    "El colegio en tu bolsillo.",
  "subheadline": "Disponible para Android. Sin instalación en el colegio.",
  "highlights":  ["Alertas en tiempo real", "Notas y comunicados", "Disponible en Android"],

}
```

**Service accessor:** `ContentService.GetPage<AppShowcase>("app")`  
**Required fields:** `headline`, `notifications` (min 1, max 3)

### `content/pages/trust.json` — singleton
```json
{
  "headline": "Diseñado para colegios que necesitan orden, velocidad y trazabilidad.",
  "blocks": [
    { "icon": "shield-check",  "title": "Datos protegidos",    "body": "Cifrado en tránsito y en reposo. Cumplimiento LOPD/GDPR." },
    { "icon": "check-circle",  "title": "Siempre disponible",  "body": "99.9% uptime garantizado. Sin mantenimientos en horario escolar." },
    { "icon": "lock",          "title": "Acceso por roles",    "body": "Cada usuario ve sólo lo que le corresponde. Sin excepciones." }
  ]
}
```
**Model:** `Models/TrustSection.cs` + `Models/TrustBlock.cs`  
**Service accessor:** `ContentService.GetPage<TrustSection>("trust")`  
**Required fields:** `headline`, `blocks` (exactly 3)

---

### `content/collections/faq/` — folder collection (3 files)

```
faq/01-niveles.json
faq/02-comunicacion.json
faq/03-modular.json
```

Each file schema:
```json
{
  "order":    1,
  "question": "¿Nexo Escolar funciona para todos los niveles educativos?",
  "answer":   "Sí. La plataforma está diseñada para colegios de Primaria, Secundaria y Bachillerato. Cada nivel puede configurar sus propios grupos, docentes y comunicados de forma independiente."
}
```
**Model:** `Models/FaqItem.cs`  
**Service accessor:** `ContentService.GetCollection<FaqItem>("faq")`  
**Required fields:** `order`, `question`, `answer`

FAQ content (verbatim):

| # | Question | Answer |
|---|----------|--------|
| 1 | ¿Nexo Escolar funciona para todos los niveles educativos? | Sí. La plataforma está diseñada para colegios de Primaria, Secundaria y Bachillerato. Cada nivel puede configurar sus propios grupos, docentes y comunicados de forma independiente. |
| 2 | ¿Cómo se comunican las familias con el colegio? | A través de la app móvil y el portal web. Los padres reciben notificaciones push de asistencia, calificaciones y comunicados institucionales en tiempo real, sin necesidad de grupos de WhatsApp. |
| 3 | ¿Podemos activar solo los módulos que necesitamos? | Sí. Nexo Escolar es modular. Puedes comenzar solo con Asistencia y añadir Comunicados, Grupos o Reportes cuando el colegio esté listo, sin coste adicional de migración. |

---

### `content/pages/footer.json` — singleton
```json
{
  "tagline":    "Conectando colegios, docentes y familias.",
  "copyright":  "© 2026 Nexo Escolar. Todos los derechos reservados."
}
```
**Model:** `Models/FooterContent.cs`  
**Service accessor:** `ContentService.GetPage<FooterContent>("footer")`  
**Required fields:** `tagline`

## Data Contracts

### C# Models

All models live in `Models/`. All properties are nullable-safe with `?` or initialized defaults.

```
Models/
  HeroBanner.cs          — singleton
  DashboardChip.cs       — nested in HeroBanner
  ProblemaSection.cs     — singleton
  PainPoint.cs           — nested in ProblemaSection
  FeatureCard.cs         — collection item
  BeneficiosHub.cs       — singleton
  RoleHub.cs             — nested in BeneficiosHub
  AppShowcase.cs         — singleton
  AppNotification.cs     — nested in AppShowcase
  TrustSection.cs        — singleton
  TrustBlock.cs          — nested in TrustSection
  FaqItem.cs             — collection item
  FooterContent.cs       — singleton
  ContactFormModel.cs    — form POST (not CMS)
```

### ContactFormModel (form POST only — not CMS-sourced)

```csharp
public class ContactFormModel
{
    [Required, MaxLength(120)]
    public string NombreCompleto { get; set; } = "";

    [Required, MaxLength(120)]
    public string NombreColegio { get; set; } = "";

    [Required, EmailAddress, MaxLength(200)]
    public string CorreoInstitucional { get; set; } = "";

    [Required, Phone, MaxLength(20)]
    public string WhatsApp { get; set; } = "";
}
```

### ContentService contract

Follows MiMascota pattern (WFO standard):

| Method | Signature | Use |
|--------|-----------|-----|
| `GetPage<T>` | `Task<T?> GetPage<T>(string slug)` | Loads `content/pages/{slug}.json` |
| `GetCollection<T>` | `Task<List<T>> GetCollection<T>(string name)` | Loads all JSON files from `content/collections/{name}/` sorted by `order` |

Cache TTL: 10 minutes (in-memory `IMemoryCache`).

---

## Component Map

### Shared Layout (`Pages/Shared/_Layout.cshtml`)

| Component | Technology | Notes |
|-----------|-----------|-------|
| `<head>` SEO block | Razor `@RenderSection("Meta")` + Schema.org JSON-LD | `marketing-seo-pack` |
| Navbar | Bootstrap 5 `navbar` + custom `glass-card` CSS | Sticky; transparent → solid on scroll via vanilla JS |
| AOS.js init | `<script>AOS.init({once:true, duration:700})</script>` | Loaded in `</body>` |
| Bootstrap JS bundle | CDN `bootstrap.bundle.min.js` | Accordion + Tabs only |
| Plus Jakarta Sans | Google Fonts `<link>` in `<head>` | Font family for all text |
| Parallax script | Inline `<script>` in `_Layout.cshtml` | Mouse-move listener; targets `.parallax-phone` + `.parallax-dash` |

### Index Page Sections (`Pages/Index.cshtml`)

| Section | Bootstrap Components | Custom CSS Classes | AOS | JS Behavior |
|---------|---------------------|--------------------|-----|-------------|
| Hero | `container`, `row`, `col-*` | `glass-card`, `parallax-phone`, `parallax-dash`, `btn-amber` | `fade-up` | Mouse-parallax (vanilla JS in `_Layout`) |
| Problema | `row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-2` | `glass-card`, `pain-card` | `fade-up` (staggered `data-aos-delay`) | None |
| Funciones | `d-grid` custom grid | `bento-grid`, `bento-large`, `bento-medium`, `bento-small` | `fade-up` | CSS hover: `scale(1.02)`, teal border |
| Beneficios | Desktop: raw `<svg>` hub + absolute panel; Mobile: `nav-tabs` + `tab-content` | `hub-wrapper`, `hub-panel`, `hub-node` | `fade-up` on hub wrapper | CSS transition `opacity 0.3s, transform 0.3s` on hover panel; Bootstrap Tabs for mobile |
| App | `row align-items-center` | `phone-frame`, `notif-card` | `fade-up` | None |
| Trust | `row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-3` | `trust-block` | `fade-up` | None |
| Demo | `row justify-content-center` | `glass-card demo-card` | `fade-up` | Bootstrap 5 client-side validation |
| FAQ | `accordion` | — | `fade-up` | Bootstrap 5 Accordion (no extra JS) |
| Footer | `footer` | `footer-nexo` | None | None |

### CSS Custom Properties (Design Tokens)

Defined in `wwwroot/css/site.css`:

```css
:root {
  --ne-navy:  #0F1B3C;
  --ne-teal:  #00C9B1;
  --ne-amber: #FFC857;
  --ne-glass-bg:     rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
  --ne-glass-border: rgba(255,255,255,0.10);
  --ne-glass-blur:   12px;
}

.glass-card {
  background:        var(--ne-glass-bg);
  border:            1px solid var(--ne-glass-border);
  backdrop-filter:   blur(var(--ne-glass-blur));
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(var(--ne-glass-blur));
  border-radius:     1rem;
}

.btn-amber {
  background-color: var(--ne-amber);
  color:            var(--ne-navy);
  font-weight:      700;
  border:           none;
}

.bento-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(12, 1fr);
  gap: 1.25rem;
}
.bento-large  { grid-column: span 7; }
.bento-medium { grid-column: span 5; }
.bento-small  { grid-column: span 4; }
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .bento-large, .bento-medium, .bento-small { grid-column: span 12; }
}

.phone-frame {
  border-radius:   3rem;
  border:          4px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.20);
  background:      var(--ne-navy);
  padding:         1.5rem;
  max-width:       280px;
}
```

### Decap CMS Admin (`wwwroot/admin/`)

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `wwwroot/admin/index.html` | Decap CMS loader (CDN) |
| `wwwroot/admin/config.yml` | Collections: `hero`, `problema`, `funciones`, `beneficios`, `app`, `trust`, `faq`, `footer` |

Backend: `github` · repo: `carlosperez1986/nexoescolar` · branch: `main` · base_url for OAuth: TBD (GitHub OAuth App required).

---

## Implementation Batches

### Batch 1 — Foundation: Scaffold + ContentService + Decap Config
**Objective:** Working .NET 9 project with content loading and admin panel.  
**Skills:** `project-scaffolding` + `content-service-and-data-wiring`  
**Tasks:** TASK-020, TASK-021, TASK-003

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `Program.cs` | Add `IMemoryCache`, `ContentService` DI, static files |
| `MiEscolar.csproj` (or `NexoEscolar.csproj`) | net9.0, no EF, no SQL |
| `Services/ContentService.cs` | `GetPage<T>` + `GetCollection<T>` + 10 min cache |
| `Models/*.cs` | All 14 models |
| `content/pages/*.json` | 6 seed JSON files (hero, problema, beneficios, app, trust, footer) |
| `content/collections/funciones/*.json` | 5 feature card seed files |
| `content/collections/faq/*.json` | 3 FAQ seed files |
| `wwwroot/admin/index.html` | Decap CMS loader |
| `wwwroot/admin/config.yml` | All 8 collections defined |

**Acceptance:** `dotnet build` → 0 errors · `/admin/` loads Decap CMS · ContentService resolves all JSON without null exceptions.

**Dependencies:** Client repo exists · GitHub OAuth App configured for Decap (or `local_backend: true` for dev)

---

### Batch 2 — Shell: Layout, Navbar, SEO, CSS tokens
**Objective:** Shared shell renders on every page with correct branding and meta.  
**Skills:** `integrate-ui-component` + `marketing-seo-pack` (partial)  
**Tasks:** TASK-004, TASK-023, TASK-024

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `Pages/Shared/_Layout.cshtml` | Full layout: `<head>` with fonts + SEO meta, navbar, AOS init, parallax script, Bootstrap JS |
| `wwwroot/css/site.css` | Design tokens + all custom classes (glass-card, btn-amber, bento-grid, phone-frame, etc.) |
| `Pages/Shared/_Meta.cshtml` (partial) | Schema.org JSON-LD for `WebSite` + `Organization` |

**Acceptance:** Layout renders with Plus Jakarta Sans · Navbar sticky glass visible · AOS.js loaded · No console errors.

**Dependencies:** Batch 1 complete.

---

### Batch 3 — Hero + Problema sections
**Objective:** Above-the-fold hero with parallax mock and pain-point cards.  
**Skills:** `integrate-ui-component`  
**Tasks:** TASK-025, TASK-026

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `Pages/Index.cshtml` | Add `#hero` section (headline, CTA, coded dashboard + phone frame) |
| `Pages/Index.cshtml` | Add `#problema` section (4 pain-point glass cards) |
| `Pages/Index.cshtml.cs` | Inject ContentService; populate `HeroBanner` + `ProblemaSection` properties |

**Acceptance:** Hero renders with coded mockup (no images) · mouse-parallax active · AOS `fade-up` on #problema cards · Mobile: single column stacked.

**Dependencies:** Batch 2 complete.

---

### Batch 4 — Funciones Bento Grid + Beneficios Interactive Hub
**Objective:** Product catalog bento grid and role-based interactive hub.  
**Skills:** `integrate-ui-component`  
**Tasks:** TASK-027, TASK-028

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `Pages/Index.cshtml` | Add `#funciones` section — bento grid with 5 feature cards; hover states via CSS |
| `Pages/Index.cshtml` | Add `#beneficios` section — SVG hub (desktop) + Bootstrap Tabs (mobile via `d-none d-md-block` / `d-md-none`) |
| `Pages/Index.cshtml.cs` | Populate `FeatureCards` + `BeneficiosHub` from ContentService |

Beneficios desktop: SVG `<circle>` for Nexo node with CSS `@keyframes pulse` ring; 3 satellite nodes; hover triggers `hub-panel` via CSS `:hover` + `position: absolute`.

**Acceptance:** Bento grid is 7/5 + 4/4/4 on desktop, full-width on mobile · Hover scale + teal border work without JS framework · Beneficios SVG renders 3 nodes · hover panel shows correct role bullets · Mobile: Bootstrap Tabs work with Bootstrap JS only.

**Dependencies:** Batch 3 complete.

**Objective:** Complete remaining landing sections.  
**Skills:** `integrate-ui-component`  
**Tasks:** TASK-029

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `Pages/Index.cshtml` | Add `#app` section — CSS phone frame + 2 notification cards |
| `Pages/Index.cshtml` | Add `#trust` section — 3 trust blocks with Bootstrap Icons (SVG inline) |
| `Pages/Index.cshtml` | Add `#demo` section — glassmorphism card with 4-field form; amber CTA |
| `Pages/Index.cshtml` | Add `#faq` section — Bootstrap Accordion with 3 items from ContentService |
| `Pages/Index.cshtml` | Add `#footer` — logo + tagline + copyright; deep navy; `border-t` teal |
| `Pages/Index.cshtml.cs` | Populate `AppShowcase`, `TrustSection`, `FaqItems`, `FooterContent` from ContentService |

**Acceptance:** All 5 sections visible on desktop and mobile · FAQ accordion expand/collapse works · Form renders all 4 fields · Footer tagline correct.

**Dependencies:** Batch 4 complete.

---

### Batch 6 — Contact Form Handler
**Objective:** Form POST validates and dispatches lead notification.  
**Skills:** `content-service-and-data-wiring` (form handler subset)  
**Tasks:** TASK-022

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `Pages/Index.cshtml.cs` | `OnPostAsync` handler: validate `ContactFormModel`; on success dispatch email or webhook (configurable via `appsettings.json`); redirect `/?success=true` |
| `appsettings.json` | `NotificationWebhook` URL key (empty default; set via env var in production) |
| `Pages/Index.cshtml` | Render `?success=true` banner: "¡Gracias! Te contactamos en menos de 24 horas hábiles." in teal |

**Acceptance:** Valid POST → redirect `/?success=true` → banner renders · Invalid POST → validation errors inline · No unhandled exceptions on missing webhook URL.

**Dependencies:** Batch 5 complete.

---

### Batch 7 — SEO + Schema.org finalization
**Objective:** Complete SEO pack with Schema.org and meta audit.  
**Skills:** `marketing-seo-pack`  
**Tasks:** TASK-023 (finalize)

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `Pages/Shared/_Layout.cshtml` | Finalize `<title>` tag: "Nexo Escolar — Plataforma de Gestión Escolar para K-12" |
| `Pages/Shared/_Meta.cshtml` | `Organization` + `WebSite` + `FAQPage` Schema.org JSON-LD |
| `wwwroot/robots.txt` | Allow all; Sitemap: `/sitemap.xml` |
| `wwwroot/sitemap.xml` | Single-page sitemap (`/` only) |
| `Pages/Index.cshtml` | `<meta name="description">` set from `HeroBanner.Subheadline` |

**Acceptance:** Schema.org JSON-LD valid (Rich Results Test) · `<title>` contains primary keyword · `robots.txt` present · `sitemap.xml` present.

**Dependencies:** Batch 5 complete.

---

## Review Gates

### Gate 1 — Technical Completeness

| Check | Pass Condition |
|-------|---------------|
| Build | `dotnet build` → 0 errors, 0 warnings |
| ContentService | All 9 JSON sources load without null exceptions |
| Form POST | Valid submission → `?success=true` redirect |
| Admin | Decap CMS loads at `/admin/`, all 8 collections visible |
| No SQL/EF | `grep -r "DbContext\|EntityFramework\|SqlClient" .` → 0 results |

### Gate 2 — UI Completeness

| Check | Pass Condition |
|-------|---------------|
| All 8 sections render | Chrome DevTools: all anchor IDs present in DOM |
| Responsive | Chrome DevTools mobile 375px: all sections single-column, no horizontal scroll |
| AOS animations | Scroll triggers `fade-up` on all sections |
| Bento grid | Desktop 7/5 + 4/4/4 columns; mobile full-width |
| Beneficios hub | Desktop SVG hub visible; hover panel transitions; Mobile Bootstrap Tabs functional |
| Navbar | Sticky; transparent → `#0F1B3C` on scroll; no layout shift |
| Glassmorphism | `glass-card` class visible with blur on Chrome + Safari |
| Typography | Plus Jakarta Sans loaded; `clamp()` scaling on resize |

### Gate 3 — Content Completeness

| Check | Pass Condition |
|-------|---------------|
| Zero placeholders | No `lorem ipsum`, `TODO`, `PLACEHOLDER` in rendered HTML |
| Spanish copy only | All visible text is Spanish |
| CMS editable | Modifying a JSON file and reloading reflects change within cache TTL (10 min) |
| FAQ copy verbatim | 3 Q&As match briefing exactly |

### Gate 4 — Pre-delivery (@Auditor)

| Check | Pass Condition |
|-------|---------------|
| Secrets scan | No API keys, tokens, or credentials in source |
| Dependency scan | No Critical/High CVEs in NuGet packages |
| HTTPS headers | `X-Frame-Options`, `X-Content-Type-Options`, `Content-Security-Policy` present |
| Decap OAuth | GitHub OAuth App configured; `/admin/` requires auth; no open write access |
| Form input | Anti-forgery token (`[ValidateAntiForgeryToken]`) on POST handler |

---

## Open Technical Questions

| # | Question | Owner | Resolution Path |
|---|----------|-------|-----------------|
| OTQ-1 | GitHub OAuth App for Decap — client needs to create it and provide `client_id` + `client_secret`. | Operator → client | Block Decap auth until provided. Use `local_backend: true` in dev. |
| OTQ-2 | Lead notification dispatch method — email (SMTP) or webhook (Make, Zapier, n8n)? | Operator | Add `NotificationWebhook` URL to `appsettings.json`; if blank, log only. |
| OTQ-3 | Custom domain for staging and production URLs. | Operator → client | Required for HTTPS cert (Let's Encrypt via Nginx). Use VPS IP for smoke test. |
| OTQ-4 | Favicon and OG image assets — client to provide or use typographic fallback? | Operator → client | If not provided: SVG favicon with "N" teal; OG image: text-only card generated with `<canvas>`. |
